calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jak S. Marquez, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Prana Associates Twenty-Two, L.P.
Igor Spitalnikov, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearaqnce by defendant Steve Fryer.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 17, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Prana Associates Twenty-Two, L.P., and against defendant Steve Fryer as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,200.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,000.00.
Costs - $263.00.
Total - $2,463.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Prana Associates Twenty-Two, L.P. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1139 Market Street, Room 201, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk F. Green/ N. Bautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Richard Beckman, Esq. for Prana Associates Twenty-Two, L.P.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by the defendant.
The trial date of Nov. 30, 2009 remains on calendar.
TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
